title: Creamy Brazilian Wild Garlic Leaves Pasta
description: A herbal and flaky lacto-vegetarian Brazilian dish featuring wild garlic leaves, perfect for a date night, cooked to perfection using sous-vide technique.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a blender or food processor, puree the wild garlic leaves with a pinch of salt until well combined.
In a large skillet, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat and add the pureed wild garlic leaves, cooking for 2 minutes.
Add the heavy cream to the skillet and stir to combine, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the cream sauce simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the grated parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Season the cream sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
Add the cooked pappardelle pasta to the cream sauce and toss to combine, ensuring the pasta is well coated.
Drizzle the olive oil over the pasta and sauce, tossing to combine.
Serve the creamy Brazilian wild garlic leaves pasta hot, garnished with additional wild garlic leaves if desired.
